heading: Permits to cut and remove timber; citizens of Washington County and Kane County, Utah
label: 610 Permits to cut and remove timber; citizens of Washington County and Kane County, Utah
text: It shall be lawful for the Secretary of the Interior to grant permits under the provisions of , to citizens of Washington County and of Kane County, Utah, to cut timber on the public lands of the counties of Mohave and Coconino, Arizona, for agricultural, mining, or other domestic purposes, and remove the timber so cut to said Washington County and Kane County, Utah.section 607 of this title
notes: CodificationSection is derived from act , which recites that it amends section 8 of act , which is the source of , by adding this section thereto. Section 8 of act , is classified to sections 607, 608 to 611a of this title.Feb. 27, 1922Mar. 3, 1891Mar. 3, 1891section 607 of this title
